title: CDC Environmental Health Tracking Network
description: Environmental health indicators including childhood lead levels, asthma ED visits, and environmental exposures. API uses numeric IDs for everything -- see the tracking network docs for the codebook.

geo_id.description: Geographic identifier. Usually matches FIPS for counties, but Virginia independent cities are special.

measure_id.description: Numeric measure ID from the tracking network

data_value.description: Could be a rate or count depending on the measure
